originalTitle: Heavy rains and flooding kills at least 23 in Nairobi
title: Heavy rains and flooding kills at least 23 in Nairobi
content: Flights in and out of Nairobi Airport have been disrupted while some roads in the capital are submerged.

originalTitle: 'Massive' numbers killed by gunmen in latest Nigeria attack, senator tells BBC
title: 'Massive' numbers killed by gunmen in latest Nigeria attack, senator tells BBC
content: Suspected Islamist militants reportedly seized control of a village for two days before being forced out by troops and air strikes.

originalTitle: Ugandan students who fled Iran air strikes recall 'ground trembling'
title: Ugandan students who fled Iran air strikes recall 'ground trembling'
content: Some opted to remain in Iran, even after their government offered to bring them home.

originalTitle: Doctors try to save girl as father was killed in Gaza Israeli attack
title: Doctors try to save girl as father was killed in Gaza Israeli attack
content: Doctors in Gaza try to save a girl who sustained injuries in an Israeli attack that hit her and killed her father.

originalTitle: Video: Satellite images reveal damage to several Iranian military bases
title: Video: Satellite images reveal damage to several Iranian military bases
content: Satellite imagery reveals extensive damage at several Iranian military sites following a wave of airstrikes.

originalTitle: Cuba says electricity plant successfully repaired after large blackout
title: Cuba says electricity plant successfully repaired after large blackout
content: A US pressure campaign, including an oil blockade, has strained the Caribbean country's ageing energy infrastructure.

originalTitle: Dozens killed as Israeli special forces raid Lebanese village in search of 40-year-old remains
title: Dozens killed as Israeli special forces raid Lebanese village in search of 40-year-old remains
content: Overnight, one Israeli operation saw at least 41 people killed and 40 injured, according to the Lebanese health ministry.

originalTitle: Iranian ambassador warns UK to be 'very careful' about further involvement in war
title: Iranian ambassador warns UK to be 'very careful' about further involvement in war
content: Seyed Ali Mousavi says Iran has a "right to self-defence" if the UK directly joins US-Israeli attacks.

originalTitle: Armed robots take to the battlefield in Ukraine war
title: Armed robots take to the battlefield in Ukraine war
content: Ukraine has embarked on a programme to deploy armed robots on the battlefield against Russian forces.

originalTitle: Chelsea overcome 10-man Wrexham in extra-time thriller
title: Chelsea overcome 10-man Wrexham in extra-time thriller
content: Chelsea twice came from behind to scupper 10-man Wrexham's hopes of a giant-killing in a thrilling FA Cup fifth-round tie.

title: 'Incredible' Bronze remains England's gold standard
content: Lucy Bronze made her 145th senior appearance for England on Saturday. Few have been better performances.

originalTitle: 'Exceptional' Dowman and Salmon make history as Gunners survive scare
title: 'Exceptional' Dowman and Salmon make history as Gunners survive scare
content: Arsenal needed their big guns to come off the bench to help them past Mansfield, but it was 16-year-olds Max Dowman and Marli Salmon who made history.
